description: Larger multi-language provenance benchmark. 30 labeled spans across 5 files (TS, Python, Go) and 8 sources. The held-out eval (src/eval-heldout.ts) calibrates the threshold on a deterministic train split and reports on the test split.

sources.content: OAuth2 Authorization Code Flow. The client exchanges an authorization code at the token endpoint for an access token and a refresh token. Access tokens are short-lived JWTs signed with HS256 and expire after 15 minutes. The token endpoint must reject any authorization code that has already been redeemed once, to prevent replay attacks.

Verifying Stripe webhook signatures. To verify, compute an HMAC-SHA256 of the raw request body using your endpoint signing secret, then compare it to the header signature using a constant-time comparison to avoid timing attacks.

For our app, refresh tokens should last 30 days, not the default. Store the refresh token hashed in the database, never in plaintext. The login endpoint should rate-limit to 5 attempts per minute per IP address.

List endpoints use cursor-based pagination. The cursor is an opaque base64 of the last item's id and created_at. Default page size is 20, maximum 100. The response includes a next_cursor field that is null when there are no more results.

All requests are logged as structured JSON with a request_id, an ISO-8601 timestamp, the route, and the latency in milliseconds. Personally identifiable information must be redacted from logs. Log level defaults to info.

Cache entries expire after a 300-second TTL. Eviction uses an LRU policy once the cache exceeds 1000 entries. Cache keys are namespaced in the form tenant:resource:id so different tenants never collide.

Failed jobs retry up to 5 times using exponential backoff starting at 1 second and doubling each attempt, capped at 30 seconds. Add random jitter of up to 50 percent of the delay to avoid thundering-herd retries.

Email addresses must match a standard pattern with a local part, an @, and a domain. Passwords must be at least 12 characters and contain at least one digit and one symbol. Usernames are 3 to 20 alphanumeric characters.
